name: claude-code-usage-indicator
description: Always-visible Claude usage (5-hour + weekly windows and reset times) in the VS Code status bar.

claudeUsage.refreshIntervalSeconds.markdownDescription: How often to re-check usage, in seconds. The endpoint enforces its own cooldown, so values between 1 and the floor are raised to the floor (60 s). On HTTP 429 the extension backs off automatically and honors `Retry-After`. `0` = manual refresh only.

claudeUsage.corePath.description: Absolute path to the usage-core binary. Leave empty to use the binary bundled with the extension (bin/).

claudeUsage.label.description: Short text shown before the percentage in the status bar (e.g. "Claude", "Claude Code usage", or empty for just the number).

claudeUsage.showWeekly.description: Also show the weekly (7-day) window percentage in the status bar, not just the 5-hour window.
